name: SmartDisplayer Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: SmartDisplayer Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells smart display cards in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides all-in-one cards; crypto currency cards; OATH card-type OTP tokens; and EMV display cards. It also offers IC, segmented e-paper, module, and firmware design; semiconductor and graphic e-paper integration; emulation kit; and credit card personalization services, as well as various OTP seed perso solutions. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Keelung, Taiwan.
